entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud compatibility with SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Is there any feature support matrix for SAP Analytics Cloud functionality for Datasphere (direct consume for analytics model)?

We have done few testing and found that nice feature such Compass, Predictive Scenario, In chart time series forecast and smart insight is not working.

Thanks for all help.

entry.title: Fiori Change Document Reuse Component not found after Deployment in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We have an interesting problem.

We developed a Fiori app using Business Application Studio (BAS) and integrated the Reuse Component for Change Documents following the provided instructions (How to Use the Fiori Reuse Library for Change Document Solution | SAP Help Portal)

The app runs perfectly in BAS. However, after deploying it to the Public Cloud (as per the tutorial Create a SAP Fiori App and Deploy it to SAP S/4HANA Cloud, ABAP Environment | SAP Tutorials), the app starts but fails as soon as a selection is triggered, showing the error: "

Errorfailed to load 'sap/nw/core/changedocs/lib/reuse/changedocscomponent/Component.js' from https://ui5.sap.com/1.130.8/resources/sap/nw/core/changedocs/lib/reuse/changedocscomponent/Component.js: script load error"

What are we missing?

We also noticed that in BAS, the .js files are accessed locally, whereas in the Public Cloud, they seem to be fetched directly from the internet. Could this be related to our issue?

BAS:

Deployed in Public Cloud:

Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

SAPUI5 

SAP Fiori 

@kaidehmann -> Danke!

entry.title: Convert a Smart Table Column Data to clickable actions in Fiori Elements Custom Card
entry.content:
HI,

I have a custom card in SAP FIORI Overview page . 

Card has a smart table with columns rendered via CDS view where in one of the column i need to convert the text to clickable actions.

My data from CDS looks like "Google,SAP" or "SAP" .

How can i convert these data to clickable actions .

My table extension code looks like below 

  onInit:function{
oSmartTable = this.getView().byId('LineItemsSmartTable');
                    oSmartTable.attachBeforeRebindTable(this.extendColumn.bind(this));
}
extentColumn:function(){
const oMultiStatusColumn = aColumns.find((col) => col.getLabel().getText() === "MultiStatusColumn");
var oMultiStatusColumnTemplate = new sap.m.HBox({
                        items: {
                            path: "MultiStatusColumn",
                            formatter: this.formatLinks.bind(this)
                        }
                    });
                 oMultiStatusColumn.setTemplate(oMultiStatusColumnTemplate);
}
formatLinks: function (sValue) {
                    if (!sValue) return [];
                    var aValues = sValue.split(", "); 
                    return aValues.map(function (sText) {
                        return new sap.m.Link({
                            text: sText,
                            press: function () {
                                sap.m.URLHelper.redirect(sText, true); 
                            }
                        });
                    });
                }
}

 This code throws either a missing template error or a List Binding error .

Any Suggestions or workaround for this scenario ? 

Thanks,

Abhi

entry.title: How to call Function Import of external OData for fetching PDF in CAPM application
entry.content:
I am developing CAP app on BAS to fetch PDF file of billing document. I am consuming standard OData API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV in CAPM, I am able to get entities data but on using function Import GetPDF, I always get undefined even though terminal shows no error. Please help.

this is the edmx definition of function import.

 

<FunctionImport Name="GetPDF" ReturnType="API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV.GetPDFResult" m:HttpMethod="GET" sap:action-for="API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV.A_BillingDocumentType"><Parameter Name="BillingDocument" Type="Edm.String" Mode="In" MaxLength="11000"/></FunctionImport>
 
Below is my code
service.js
=======
 
const cds = require('@sap/cds');
 
module.exports = cds.service.impl(async function () {
    const {BD} = this.entities;
    const BDService = await cds.connect.to('API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV');
 
    this.on('READ', 'BD', async (req) => {
        return await BDService.run(SELECT.from(BD)); // Successfully connects and returns data from entity
    });

    this.on('getFile',  async (req) => {
        const {docNo} = req.data;
        const parameters = { BillingDocument: docNo };
        const headers = { "Accept" : "application/json"  };
 
        const result = await BDService.send("GetPDF",parameters,headers);
        return result; // undefined sadly, expecting binary pdf string, directly calling api loads PDF data
    });
 
});
 
service.cds
=========
 
using {API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV} from './external/API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV.csn';

service BillingDocumentService {

  entity BD as select from API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV.A_BillingDocument;

  function getFile(docNo : String) returns API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV.GetPDFResult;
 
}

I have referred below github for using function import

https://github.com/SAP-samples/btp-extension-s4-material-availability/blob/main/srv/service.js

Below is documentation

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/03c04db2a7434731b7fe21dca77440da/990f1ce2078f42e4b593d6d060966bd8.html

entry.title: UI5 App Offline Navigation Issue – Best Approach?
entry.content:
Hey! 
I have developed a UI5 application with two views (main and details). My goal is to use the app in offline mode and still be able to navigate between the views without requiring a network connection.

i tried loading using sap.ui.view and i saw the view and controller loaded, but when navigating offline i still see a fetch trying to get the view even though the files are already fetched! 
Also i tried other ideas but that was the closest i think

Got any ideas? Maybe register the fetched view or connect it to the router so it won’t try to fetch the view? 
thanks!

entry.title: Best approach to handle a really large dataset for a SAP UI5 Table using pagination?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm working on a SAPUI5 application where I need to display a very large dataset — around 700,000 records with 82 columns.

Currently, I'm fetching the data via an AJAX call but that seems to be limited to 1000 records. I've tried using a simple table with the growing="true" and a defined growingThreshold, but I’ve noticed that the “Load More” feature only paginates locally, using the initially fetched data. It doesn't trigger a new call to the backend, which is what I need.

This would be just the first step. After implementing this incremental loading, I will also need to apply filters on columns and these filters will need to be included in the request URL.

What would be the best approach overall? I considered adding a "Load More" button (instead of relying on the default one provided by the table via growing="true") and handling the pagination manually (implementing my own logic), appending data to the table, and managing skip/top values myself. Is there a better approach for this?

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: In UI5 planning calendar appointments date is showing one day before
entry.content:
HI Team,

I am Working on one requirement, but here in sap ui5 planning calendar control appointment is showing one day before.

Please let me know how to resolve this error.

Regards,

Preeti

entry.title: Issue in enabling the Horizontal scrollbar in the Sap Smart table
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I got a requirement to enable the horizontal scrollbar for the smart table and columns & values should not wrap inside the smart table ? 

Can someone suggest how can i achieve it ? tableType of the smart table is "Table".

I have tried keeping the smart table inside the scroll container but nothing happening but when i keep the table which is inside the Smart table in scroll container its coming as below

Please can someone throw light on this.

entry.title: Can I deliver a custom theme to all subscribers of my multitenant SaaS solution?
entry.content:
Hi Community,

how can a SaaS provider deliver a SAP custom theme (created with UI Theme Designer in Provider Subaccount) to the SaaS application of the subscriber.

The solution which is possible at the moment:
Develop a Launchpad Module in the CAP Project and integrate the theme designer to it. This allows to use a custom theme created by the customer/subscriber. But themes from provider are not selectable/usable.

Documentation for creating a launchpad module:
Create a Multitarget Application and Add Modules | SAP Help Portal

Documentation for using theme designer in launchpad module:
Creating Custom Themes | SAP Help Portal

UI theme designer SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition

entry.title: Fiori Elements - How to detect navigation and read routing parameters in a custom page (controller)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm developing a Fiori Elements app using UI5 version 1.120.x. The app includes a ListReport and an ObjectPage. I've now added a third view using a custom page based on the Flexible Programming Model. The new view is called Employee, and its controller extends from sap/fe/core/PageController.

I’m trying to figure out two things:

  1. How can I detect when the navigation to this custom page has occurred?

  2. How can I read optional routing parameters that might have been passed during navigation?

I noticed that when using a Controller Extension, it's possible to override certain lifecycle methods like onBeforeBinding or onAfterBinding, as shown here:
https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/test-resources/sap/fe/core/fpmExplorer/index.html#/controllerExtensions/routingExtensibility

However, this approach doesn’t seem to work for view controllers that inherit directly from sap/fe/core/PageController. Is there an equivalent or recommended way to hook into the navigation lifecycle for such custom pages?

Any guidance or examples would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: SAP BTP Document Management Service Not Uploading PDF Document in Repository
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We have a requirement where we need to upload PDF files into BTP Document Management Service from Fiori App using below SAP Document Management Service API.

We have done all the set up for Service Instance and Destination but when we upload PDF file using File Uploader we pass below fields.

 

The problem is that the file that is placed in Repository is not opening it is just a file being placed in BTP.

Can someone help?

entry.title: SAP UI5: Error Binding DatePicker Controls and Filtering with OData Model
entry.content:
Problem Description: I am facing an issue where I am unable to properly bind DatePicker controls in an SAP UI5 fragment and use them for filtering an OData model. Specifically, when I try to retrieve values from the DatePicker controls and apply filters to the OData model, I encounter the error sap.m.MessageToast.show("DatePicker controls are not available."); This error suggests that the DatePicker controls are not accessible, but they are part of the opened fragment.

Scenario: I have a fragment that includes two DatePicker controls (DPFrom and DPTo), and I want to use them for filtering records based on a date range (ALERTE_CRE_DATE) from an OData model. The error occurs when trying to access the DatePicker values in the controller. you should know that the fragment is opend

Here’s a part of the relevant code I’m working with: 

<core:FragmentDefinition xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:core="sap.ui.core">
    <Dialog
        id="helloWorldDialog"
        title="Date Selection"
        class="sapUiResponsivePadding"
        resizable="true"
        stretchOnPhone="true"
        afterClose="onDialogClose">
        
        <Panel
            id="datePanel"
            width="auto">
            
            <!-- 'From' DatePicker -->
            <Label text="From:" labelFor="DPFrom"/>
            <DatePicker
                id="DPFrom"
                placeholder="Enter From Date..."
                change="handleChangeFrom"
                class="sapUiSmallMarginBottom"/>

            <!-- 'To' DatePicker -->
            <Label text="To:" labelFor="DPTo"/>
            <DatePicker
                id="DPTo"
                placeholder="Enter To Date..."
                change="handleChangeTo"
                class="sapUiSmallMarginBottom"/>
         
            <FlexBox
                height="30px"
                alignItems="End"
                justifyContent="End">
                <items>
                    <Button text="Select" press="onSelectPress" type="Emphasized" class="sapUiSmallMarginEnd" />
                    <Button text="Cancel" press="onCancelPress" class="sapUiTinyMarginEnd" />
                </items>
            </FlexBox>
        </Panel>
    </Dialog>
</core:FragmentDefinition>
onhandleDate: function(oEvent) {
    var that = this;
    if (!this._valueHelpDialogDate) {
        this._valueHelpDialogDate = sap.ui.xmlfragment("DateFilter", "com.faurecia.stockMonitorCatalog.view.ValueHelpDialogDate", this);
        this.getView().addDependent(this._valueHelpDialogDate); // Ensures the fragment is added as a dependent
    }
    this._valueHelpDialogDate.open();
},

onSelectPress: function(oEvent) {
    var oFromDate = this.byId("DPFrom");
    var oToDate = this.byId("DPTo");

    // Check if the DatePicker controls are available
    if (!oFromDate || !oToDate) {
        sap.m.MessageToast.show("DatePicker controls are not available.");
        return;
    }

    var fromDateValue = oFromDate.getDateValue();
    var toDateValue = oToDate.getDateValue();

    if (fromDateValue && toDateValue) {
        // Create filters for the OData model
        var aFilters = [
            new sap.ui.model.Filter("ALERTE_CRE_DATE", sap.ui.model.FilterOperator.GE, fromDateValue),
            new sap.ui.model.Filter("ALERTE_CRE_DATE", sap.ui.model.FilterOperator.LE, toDateValue)
        ];

        // Apply filters to the OData model and read data
        var oModel = this.getView().getModel("listModel");
        oModel.read("/StockDataSet", {
            filters: aFilters,
            success: function(oData) {
                // Update the model with the filtered data
                var oFilteredModel = new sap.ui.model.json.JSONModel(oData.results);
                this.getView().setModel(oFilteredModel, "filteredModel");

                // Close the DatePicker dialog
                this._valueHelpDialogDate.close();
            }.bind(this),  // Bind the correct context
            error: function() {
                sap.m.MessageToast.show("Error occurred while fetching data.");
            }
        });
    } else {
        sap.m.MessageToast.show("Please select both 'From' and 'To' dates.");
    }
}

entry.title: SAPUI5 : Extra PATCH call triggered on changing value of annotation based drop down.
entry.content:
We have observed a issue in Fiori Elements based List Report CAPM application for newer SAPUI5 versions > 1.120.0

We are currently on SAPUI5 version 1.134.0. We have defined annotation based drop down on object page as below and it renders fine with required values on UI.

Now every time we change value of this drop down, we observe an extra PATCH call triggered immediately on entity, trying to update the entity with this changed value of property referenced by dropdown, in this case firstName.

This causes wrong updating of entity value in database and if entity is defined @readonly, error is generated saying we are trying to update read-only entity.

Please guide on how to avoid this extra PATCH call or any workaround.

Please find below repo replicating the issue.

https://github.com/MudassirHasan1/ui5service

Regards.

entry.title: Can I have a scroll bar for sap.m.tree in Mobile devices?
entry.content:
I tried to enclose the tree in a scroll container

<ScrollContainer vertical="true" width="auto" height="{parts: [{path: 'device>/resize/height'}], formatter: '.editHeightOfVSB'}">

The height will be around 80% percent of the container. With this code, I could see two scroll bars while running app in BAS. But in the mobile, I don't see the scroll bars.

The scrolling works but I need to show the bars to let the user know where he is at. 
Thanks for the help in advance.

entry.title: SAP-Ariba Back up and Restore tests
entry.content: We have an ogoing SAP-Ariba periodic review and us, customer, obviously cannot do back up. When and how is the back up and restore test being done by SAP? I need to confirm when was latest back up from (what date), when was the latest restore test from (what date), and actions needed. Thanks!

entry.title: Undefined new sap.ui.layout.form.SimpleForm
entry.content:
Hi,

I have defined the SimpleForm control as below and it has always worked in Neo.

I am testing the same app / control in Foundry Dev subaccount and also works, however when testing in Pre-Prod subaccount sometimes it works and sometimes I have the error: Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'SimpleForm').

 
var dialog = new sap.m.Dialog({
                title: sMsgYA,
                type: "Message",
                state: "Success",
                content: [
                    new sap.ui.layout.form.SimpleForm({
                        editable: false,
 
Does anybody know what the error might be?.
Thanks,
Javier

entry.title: Return case for material without master data
entry.content:
Hi,

I received a question from customer where they would like to create a return for a material without a material number and material master data. The original PO was created with an account assignment to cost center. The advanced return PO option is not an alternative as I've understood it. What are the remaining options for customer? They work with Public Cloud. They have received a credit memo invoice but have nothing to match it with.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement

entry.title: Error Creating Content Provider for SAP Build Work Zone in Consumer Subaccount
entry.content:
I am trying to create a multi-tenant application with SAPUI5 interface that is consumed by the subscriber's SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition subscription, but I am getting errors trying to create the Content Provider. 

Following the tutorial in the documentation Developing HTML5 Business Solutions as Content Providers, which has steps for Multitenant consumption via subscription. I updated the "sap.cloud.service" in the SAPUI5 manifest.json file, added the cdm.json file and the script on the mta.yaml file to copy it to the resources folder. I also defined the destination templates in the provider side.

After that I followed the Administrator steps in Federation of HTML5 Business Solutions documentation. Subscribed to the multi-tenant app from another subaccount in the same environment and region. Exported and imported the destinations to the consumer subaccount, changing the runtime destination URL to the subscription URL of the consumer.

However after I create the Content Provider in the consumer SAP Build Work Zone channel manager, the content fetch fails with the following message:

"<Connectivity/InternalError>: Could not fetch content due to an internal error. Please try again later. If the issue persists, please open a ticket on the connectivity service."

This is the code I am currently working in https://github.tools.sap/I538205/simple-saas-mt/tree/bwz 
and I also tested the sample from https://github.com/SAP-samples/build-workzone-integration/tree/main/standard/html5-content-provider-sample which also failed to import the content provider.

Has anyone else here faced this issue? How can I solve it?

entry.title: Possibility of Filter shortcut in smart table column menu in newer SAPUI5 versions after 1.133
entry.content:
Dear All

Is there any way we can get the filter button back in the Column menu of Smart table? This was available in older SAPUI5 versions before 1.133 and now the column menu design has changed. I see sorting & grouping is available, but the filter shortcut is unavailable. We need to click on the settings icon to open the Filter tab in the Personalization menu, which is a couple of extra clicks for the users to reach the filter menu, and they were unhappy with the new column menu after ui5 version update.
PS- I have a Smart Table wrapped around a grid table having custom columns. We are running the apps in BTP launchpad.

Column menu look after version 1.133



Before version 1.133 - This filter shortcut is what I need in column menu.



Any suggestions or possible customizations will be really helpful. 

Thanks & Cheers
Naresh

entry.title: Prevent Extra Rows/Weeks from Showing in SinglePlanningCalendar (Month View)
entry.content:
I have a TypeScript application that uses a SinglePlanningCalendar in Month View.  I see 6 weeks showing for April 2025, for example.  April 30th is in the 5th row and I don't want the "extra" week to be showing.
I've tried all sorts of things to hide the row, including trying to get the parent and remove the child from the parent but nothing seems to be working.

Any ideas and/or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

Ron
